arts.ttl: Matt Clarke, Tommy Conway, Dael Fry - Boro injury update ahead of Watford
arts.sum: Clarke will be expected to return to the Boro squad for the Watford game - Boro's last before the second international break of the season. Matt Clarke and Dael Fry are back training for Middlesbrough ahead of the weekend trip to Watford, while Tommy Conway has been described as 'touch and go' to be available for the trip.
